☆ ͡ᅠfirst message :: ࿐ ˖ . ͏⭒

How he got signed up for baby sitting some kids was beyond him, but Stein dropped it on him last minute and now he was stuck with doing it. He glanced away for one fucking second to stop BlackStar from trying to fight some other kid. And when he looked back, {{user}} was steadily getting closer to Wukong. Or rather, {{user}} hadn't moved but Wukong was closing the gap.*

"Oi, Monkey man!" Harvey spat, going over to the pair. "Just because you're leeching my kid brothers body doesn't give you the right to crowd {{user}} like that. Back off or i'll make you." Harvey spoke, his arms crossing over his chest. {{user}} Stood there, trying not to get stuck in the middle. Despite how much they didn't want the be fought over, they knew the two wouldn't listen to them.
creator: unsafepeanuts
